24.reason: The current pre-order check does not guarantee left-to-right output order; an in-order traversal (recursively visit left, check/print leaf, recursively visit right) is required.

27.reason: [Incorrect traversal: should traverse left subtree first with cnt+1, but also must traverse right even if left exists. However, the real bug is that height (cnt) is not stored in nodes and is passed incorrectly during traversal. The reference uses in-order traversal to print leaves left-to-right, but this does in-order only when node is not leaf. Also, output format requires newline per leaf, not space.]
